# Geometry Optimization Analysis

::: reaxkit.analysis.timeseries.geometry_optimization
    options:
      show_root_heading: false
      show_root_full_path: false
      members: []

## Request: `GeometryOptimizationRequest`

<div class="analysis-section-indent" markdown="1">

Request payload for geometry-optimization series extraction.

This request selects optimization components and whether to include the
geometry descriptor in every output row.

### Fields

| Field | Type | Default | Help | Choices |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `component` | `Sequence[str] \| None` |  |  |  |
| `include_geo_descriptor` | `bool` | False | Whether to include the geometry descriptor in output rows. | True, False |

### Examples

```python
request = GeometryOptimizationRequest(
    component=["E_pot", "RMSG"],
    include_geo_descriptor=True,
)
```
The request selects two components and includes the geometry label per row.

</div>

## Task: `GeometryOptimizationTask`

<div class="analysis-section-indent" markdown="1">

Return selected geometry-optimization summary data from fort.57.

### Method: `recommended_presentations(_result: GeometryOptimizationResult, payload: dict[str, Any])`

<div class="analysis-method-indent" markdown="1">

Recommend default table/plot views for geometry-optimization output.

Works on
Analyzer task output for ``geometry_optimization_data``.

#### Parameters

| Name | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `_result` | `GeometryOptimizationResult` | Typed analyzer result instance. |
| `payload` | `dict[str, Any]` | Serialized payload expected to include ``table`` rows. |

#### Returns

| Type | Description |
|---|---|
| `list[PresentationSpec]` | Presentation specs for table and component-value plots. |

#### Examples

```text
```python
specs = GeometryOptimizationTask.recommended_presentations(
    _result,
    {"table": [{"iter": 10, "component": "RMSG", "value": 0.2}]},
)
```
The returned list includes a table and a ``value`` vs ``iter`` plot.
```


</div>

### Method: `run(data: GeometryOptimizationProgressData, request: GeometryOptimizationRequest, reporter=None)`

<div class="analysis-method-indent" markdown="1">

Run geometry-optimization component series extraction.

Works on
``GeometryOptimizationProgressData`` parsed from fort.57-like artifacts.

#### Parameters

| Name | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `data` | `GeometryOptimizationProgressData` | Parsed optimization progress arrays. |
| `request` | `GeometryOptimizationRequest` | Component and descriptor inclusion configuration. |
| `reporter` | `Any, optional` | Progress callback accepted by analyzer tasks. |

#### Returns

| Type | Description |
|---|---|
| `GeometryOptimizationResult` | Long-form geometry-optimization rows. |

#### Examples

```text
```python
result = GeometryOptimizationTask().run(
    data,
    GeometryOptimizationRequest(component=["E_pot"]),
)
```
``result.table`` contains iteration/value rows for requested components.
```


</div>

</div>

## Result: `GeometryOptimizationResult`

<div class="analysis-section-indent" markdown="1">

Result payload for geometry-optimization series extraction.

The analyzer returns long-form iteration/component/value rows suitable for
table inspection and component-wise plotting.

### Fields

| Field | Type | Default | Help | Choices |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `table` | `pd.DataFrame` |  |  |  |
| `request` | `GeometryOptimizationRequest` |  |  |  |

### Examples

```python
row = {"iter": 120, "component": "RMSG", "value": 0.0123}
```
The sample row captures one optimization component value at one iteration.

</div>
